data: {"generalSituation":"Relatively humid easterly airstreams will affect the coast of eastern Guangdong today and tomorrow. There will be mist patches. A southerly airstream will affect the coast of southern China gradually early next week. It will be hot with a few showers over the region. Troughs of low pressure are expected to bring unsettled weather to southern China next week. There will be thunderstorms over inland areas.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260327","week":"Friday","forecastWind":"East to southeast force 2 to 3.","forecastWeather":"Mainly cloudy.
